name: Cash Pawn
description_short: EZPAWN's Cash Pawn location in Austin offers collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry buying, and discounted pre-owned merchandise. Get fast cash by pawning items or selling valuables.
description_long:
Cash Pawn is an EZPAWN franchise location operating at 6904 Cameron Road in Austin, Texas. The store is part of the EZPAWN network, a pawn shop chain that provides collateral-based lending and retail services to consumers seeking quick cash or discounted goods. The location has been established as a community-serving pawn shop in the Austin market.

The store offers multiple financial and retail services centered on collateral-based transactions. Customers can obtain pawn loans by bringing items in decent working condition to receive immediate cash, with loan amounts determined by item value. The business buys gold and diamond jewelry at competitive prices, leveraging expert appraisals to determine fair market value. Beyond lending, Cash Pawn operates as a retailer, offering pre-owned brand-name electronics, tools, gaming equipment, musical instruments, jewelry, handbags, and sneakers at 25-70% discounts off retail. The store also provides layaway options (10% down, monthly payments) and third-party "Take Today" financing for items customers wish to purchase immediately with deferred payment plans.

Cash Pawn differentiates itself through its Instant Quote tool, allowing online item valuations before visiting the store, and the EZ+ Rewards Program, which awards points on pawn, redemption, and retail transactions for future discounts. The store carries firearms and offers auto loans—services not universally available at all pawn locations. Store hours extend to 8 pm on weekdays and noon Sunday openings, providing accessibility for working customers. The business emphasizes expert gold buying, daily inventory turnover, and protection plans (Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts; Product Protection Plans for electronics).

Cash Pawn serves consumers needing immediate cash against collateral, those seeking discounted pre-owned merchandise, and individuals looking to sell precious metals. However, pawn loans carry fees and interest; customers must relinquish items until loans are repaid. The retail inventory is secondhand, and not all advertised services (online payments, financing options) are available in all states. This is fundamentally a collateral-based lender, not a credit-building or alternative lending solution, making it most appropriate for customers with valuable physical assets and tolerance for asset-backed borrowing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Instant online quote tool for item valuations before visiting the store
Extended store hours (9am-8pm weekdays, 9am-7pm Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday) for accessibility
Expert gold and diamond jewelry appraisals with top-dollar buyback prices
Large rotating inventory of pre-owned brand merchandise (electronics, tools, gaming, musical gear) with 25-70% discounts
EZ+ Rewards Program offers points on transactions redeemable for discounts
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down) and third-party financing (up to 12+ months)
Additional services like firearms sales and auto loans not standard at all pawn shops
Jewelry VIP membership with guaranteed loan amounts and 100% trade-up value on future purchases
cons: Pawn loans carry undisclosed fees and interest charges; full terms require in-store consultation
All retail merchandise is pre-owned and secondhand; no new items available
Layaway and online payment options not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania
Items pawned are held as collateral; failure to repay results in loss of personal property
No credit-building benefit from pawn transactions—does not report payment history to credit bureaus
best_for: Individuals with valuable items (electronics, jewelry, tools, instruments) needing immediate cash
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking 25-70% discounts on pre-owned brand-name merchandise
Gold and diamond jewelry sellers looking for expert appraisals and competitive buyback prices
Consumers with collateral who prefer asset-backed loans over unsecured personal loans
diagnosis: Cash Pawn is best for consumers with valuable physical assets who need immediate cash and are comfortable using collateral-based borrowing. The primary caveat is that pawn loans carry fees and interest while offering no credit-building benefits, and unpaid loans result in asset forfeiture—making this a short-term emergency solution rather than a credit improvement tool.
services: Pawn loans on items in working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying and appraisal
Retail sales of pre-owned electronics, tools, gaming, musical instruments, and accessories
Layaway purchases (10% down with monthly payments)
Third-party financed payment plans ("Take Today" option, up to 12+ months)
Instant online quote tool for item valuations
EZ+ Rewards Program with points on eligible transactions
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
Jewelry VIP Protection Program with guaranteed loan amounts
Online shopping and daily inventory browsing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
